ddls:
CREATE TABLE "glass_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glass sample */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the sample belongs to */,
  "glass_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier or name of the glass sample */,
  "sio2" REAL /* Concentration of SiO2 in the glass sample */,
  "na2o" REAL /* Concentration of Na2O in the glass sample */,
  "zno" REAL /* Concentration of ZnO in the glass sample */,
  "la2o3" REAL /* Concentration of La2O3 in the glass sample */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sample */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sample */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was last updated */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the sample */,
  "sample_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sample in grams */,
  "sample_size" REAL /* Size of the sample in cubic centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the series */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the series was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the series */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the series was last updated */,
  "series_category" TEXT /* Category of the series (e.g., experimental, production) */,
  "series_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the series (e.g., batch, prototype) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the note is related to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., observation, question, action item) */,
  "note_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the note (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_notes_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_notes_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the reference is related to */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., article, book, report) */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reference */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reference was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the reference */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the reference was last updated */,
  "reference_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_references_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_references_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_references_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_experimental_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the result is related to */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., tensile strength, thermal conductivity) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the experimental result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the experimental result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the result was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the result was last updated */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "result_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_experimental_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_experimental_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_experimental_results_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the image is related to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the image */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the image was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the image */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the image was last updated */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., microscopic, macroscopic) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_images_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_images_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_images_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the history event is related to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., creation, update, deletion) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_history_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the publication is related to */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the publication */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the publication */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was last updated */,
  "publication_journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "publication_issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_publications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_publications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_publications_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the data is related to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., literature, experimental data) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the external data */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the external data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the data entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the data entry was last updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the external data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the external data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_external_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_external_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_external_data_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the collaborator is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the collaborator */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collaborator entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the collaborator entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the collaborator entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the collaborator entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_collaborators_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample the keyword is related to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword itself */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the keyword entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the keyword entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the keyword entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the keyword entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_keywords_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_keywords_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
